prompt:
I just finished a discovery call with Bright Smile Dental, a dental clinic in Sydney. Here are the key points:

- They're a 3-dentist practice in Parramatta, open Mon-Sat 8am-6pm
- Currently missing 30% of inbound calls during peak hours (10am-2pm)
- Receptionist is overwhelmed — can't answer phones and handle walk-ins simultaneously
- They want an AI receptionist to handle: appointment booking, rescheduling, general inquiries (hours, location, services), and after-hours calls
- They use Google Calendar for scheduling and have a basic website
- Budget is flexible but they want to see ROI within 3 months
- Key contact: Dr. Sarah Chen (owner) and Maria (office manager)
- They mentioned competitors are using chatbots but they want voice specifically
- Insurance questions come up a lot — they accept most major providers
- They need the AI to sound warm and professional, not robotic

Create a blueprint for this project.

assertions.text: Blueprint contains a discovery summary with pain points and goals extracted from the brief
Blueprint contains numbered phases with sub-tasks
Called generate_diagram or mcp__claude_ai_Figma__generate_diagram to create the flowchart, NOT defaulting to Mermaid
Did not output a Mermaid diagram as the primary flowchart (Mermaid only acceptable if FigJam explicitly errored)
